name: First Community Bank
description_short: San Benito, TX's First Community Bank at 1151 W US Highway 77 offers convenient branch banking.
description_long:
First Community Bank's San Benito branch sits at 1151 W US Highway 77, providing accessible banking services to residents throughout San Benito and the surrounding South Texas area. This standalone location offers drive-through and lobby services during regular business hours, making it convenient for quick banking needs.

At the San Benito, TX location, customers can handle deposits, withdrawals, account inquiries, and other routine banking services. While specific phone hours are available through the main branch line, visitors can also stop by in person to speak with staff about loans, accounts, and local financial services.

For San Benito residents, this US Highway 77 location provides a reliable option for traditional banking services. Bring your ID and account information for faster transactions, and plan your visit during regular banking hours. First Community Bank serves the community with straightforward, local service.
services: Electronic invoice creation and payment processing (via Autobooks integration)
pros: 9 physical branch locations throughout Rio Grande Valley for in-person service
Personalized, first-name basis service with named staff members receiving customer praise
Active community involvement with sponsorships of local events (Charro Days, Brewfest, Jalapeño 100)
Integrated small business tools through Autobooks partnership for invoicing and online payments
User-friendly website and responsive local management accessible by phone
Comprehensive product suite including personal/business accounts, loans, investments, and merchant services
Received 5-star rating award demonstrating quality service recognition
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Rio Grande Valley region; not accessible for customers outside Texas service area
No mention of competitive rate information, promotional offers, or rate guarantees on deposit or loan products
Limited online banking and digital service details provided; appears to emphasize branch relationships over digital-first capabilities
No information about fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or product-specific terms
No specialized lending products for credit-challenged borrowers or alternative financial services mentioned

contact.address: 1151 W Us Highway 77, San Benito, TX 78586

best_for: Rio Grande Valley residents and businesses seeking local, relationship-based banking with in-person service
Small business owners needing personalized lending and merchant services with local management access
Customers who value community bank engagement and local event sponsorships over large national institutions
Businesses seeking integrated invoicing and online payment tools alongside traditional banking services
diagnosis: First Community Bank is best suited for Rio Grande Valley residents and small business owners who prioritize personalized, local banking relationships and community involvement over digital convenience or competitive national rates. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank operates exclusively in the Rio Grande Valley region, making it inaccessible for customers outside this Texas area seeking in-person services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
